---
name: General Issue
about: Use this template for bugs, tasks, or feature requests in the admin dashboard project.
title: "[ISSUE] "
labels: ""
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

_A clear and concise description of the issue, task, or feature._

---

## Type

- [ ] Bug
- [ ] Feature Request
- [ ] Task

---

## Steps to Reproduce / Acceptance Criteria

_If this is a bug, list steps to reproduce. If a feature or task, list clear acceptance criteria._

---

## Expected Behavior

_Describe what you expect to happen._

---

## Actual Behavior (if applicable)

_Describe what is happening instead._

---

## Additional Context

_Any relevant information, screenshots, error messages, or links._

---

## Checklist

- [ ] Issue is clearly described
- [ ] Acceptance criteria are defined
- [ ] Related documentation or references are included (if any)
